name: WATOJUTSU: CHOUTEN TOU SEI (WATOJUTSU: MORNING SKY SWORD RUSH)

description.value:
This basic Wato technique is performed by planting the tip of the sword in the ground and using it as a stepping stone, pulling it up with a sharp tug on the tassel.

The user makes a Jump check (DC 15) at a +4 bonus; for every 10 points he exceeds this check, he gains a +1 bonus to his coming attack roll (minimum +1, maximum +5). The user makes a single melee attack against his target and deals damage normally, though he only applies half his Strength modifier to attack rolls.

If the attack hits and deals damage, the subject must succeed a Fortitude save to avoid being dazed for 1d4 rounds.

Requires: : Chouyaku no Jutsu (t)

Mastery: The fifth step of mastery allows the technique to be used in conjunction with Shouha Tou Sei, as a full-attack action. He must be moving at speed rank 3 or higher to do so. The technique's effective rank counts as though it was 3 higher, its perform DC increases by 8 (in addition to the effective rank increase), and its cost increase by 5, though it cannot be converted to hit points.

Material Focus -The user's Wato, katana, double katana or hansori.
